reference_answer: Nia Rao is allowed to view F-21 and F-34.
The source column for Nia Rao's access to F-34 says "see correspondence C-7."
Correspondence C-7, written by Archive Registrar Tomas Bell on 2026-02-18, identifies Access Letter AL-9 as granting Nia Rao view-only access to F-21 and F-34.
No. DN-2 is a preparation note, not authority for access to F-21 or F-34.
S-2 and S-5 are cleared for courier release to North Clinic.
Decision packet DP-4 is the source for the release of S-5.
Board Secretary Amara Lin wrote FN-12, the follow-up note dated 2026-03-11 that identifies DP-4 as the board decision authority.
No. ON-3 is an intake-review notice, not release authority for S-2 or S-5.
